name: AI-Trader
readme_summary: AI-Trader is a fully automated, agent-native trading platform designed to enable AI agents to exchange ideas, trade, and collaborate in financial markets. It supports seamless integration of various AI agents and offers features for collective intelligence, cross-platform signal synchronization, and copy trading across stocks, crypto, forex, and more.
primary_use_case: To provide a dedicated platform for AI agents to autonomously engage in trading activities, fostering collaboration and idea exchange within financial markets.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant digital marketplace where diverse AI agents, represented by distinct robotic avatars with glowing interfaces, are actively exchanging glowing data streams and trading symbols (stocks, crypto icons) on holographic screens. One central AI agent is depicted as a conductor, orchestrating the flow of information and trades between others. Subtle UI elements showing market charts and trading signals are integrated into the background. The scene is set in a futuristic, clean environment with a dynamic, interconnected network visual. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with bright, energetic colors and a focus on connectivity and automated exchange.

name: geo-seo-claude
description: GEO-first SEO skill for Claude Code. Comprehensive AI search optimization for any website — citability scoring, AI crawler analysis, brand authority, schema markup, platform-specific optimization, and PDF reports.  If you want learn how to sell this to real businesses, check out the skool community
readme_summary: This Python repository provides a comprehensive GEO-first SEO skill for Claude Code, designed to optimize websites for AI-powered search engines while maintaining traditional SEO practices. It offers a suite of tools for auditing, analysis, and reporting, focusing on AI crawler access, brand authority, and structured data.
key_features: GEO-first SEO optimization for AI search engines
Comprehensive audits (full GEO+SEO, quick visibility, technical, content)
Structured data (schema markup) analysis and generation
primary_use_case: Optimizing websites for AI-powered search engines and generating client-ready SEO reports.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old owl, perched on a globe, meticulously examining a digital map with a magnifying glass. The map is overlaid with glowing data streams and AI-generated search result snippets. The owl's eyes emit a soft, analytical light, symbolizing intelligence and foresight. Below the owl, a small, stylized website icon is being transformed by glowing lines of code into a prominent, highlighted marker on the map. Subtle UI elements showing 'Citability Score' and 'Brand Authority' appear near the owl. The background is a soft, futuristic cityscape at dawn, representing the evolving digital landscape. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a clean, modern aesthetic and a color palette of blues, greens, and golds.

name: web-to-app
description: A native Android application that converts any website URL into a standalone Android App.
readme_summary: WebToApp is a native Android application that allows users to convert any website URL into a standalone Android application without requiring any coding knowledge or Android Studio. It offers features like one-click building, AI-powered development tools, and security enhancements.
primary_use_case: To enable users to easily create native Android applications from existing websites or web content, making web content accessible as standalone mobile apps.
cover_image_prompt: A magical blueprint unfolds, transforming a simple website URL displayed on a tablet into a fully formed, miniature Android robot character. The URL is represented by glowing digital text flowing from the tablet, while the Android robot is being constructed from shimmering code particles. In the background, a user smiles, holding the finished robot. Subtle UI elements of the WebToApp interface are visible on the tablet screen. The scene is bright and futuristic, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with vibrant colors and clear, distinct elements.

name: plane
description: 🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.
readme_summary: Plane is an open-source project management platform designed to be a modern alternative to tools like Jira and Linear. It offers features for managing tasks, sprints, documentation, and product roadmaps, aiming to simplify project tracking without complex tool administration.
key_features: Work Items: Create and manage tasks with a rich text editor, file uploads, sub-properties, and issue referencing.
Cycles: Track sprint progress with burn-down charts and other tools.
Modules: Divide complex projects into smaller, manageable parts.
Views: Create custom filters to display relevant issues and save/share them.
Pages: Capture and organize ideas with AI capabilities, rich text editing, and conversion to actionable items.
Analytics: Access real-time insights and visualize project trends.
primary_use_case: A self-hostable or cloud-based project management platform for teams to track issues, manage sprints, and organize product roadmaps.
cover_image_prompt: A bustling, organized workshop where a master craftsman is meticulously assembling a complex clockwork mechanism. Gears, blueprints, and tools are neatly laid out. The craftsman uses a glowing magnifying glass to inspect intricate parts, transforming scattered components (representing raw tasks and ideas) into a perfectly functioning clock (representing a completed project). Subtle digital interfaces displaying progress charts and task lists are integrated into the workshop's benches. The repository name 'Plane' is subtly etched onto a blueprint. The scene is rendered in a warm, inviting 3D isometric illustration style, emphasizing clarity and order.

name: Forkit_Dev
description: Forkit Core is an open source passport layer for AI models and agents with GitHub CI validation, local verification, and Hugging Face-compatible export.
readme_summary: Forkit Core provides an open-source, local-first passport infrastructure for AI models and agents. It enables deterministic identity, verifiable provenance, and integrity checking, allowing AI systems to have portable and traceable digital identities that can be managed and validated locally or within CI/CD pipelines.
key_features: Deterministic passport_id derivation for ModelPassport and AgentPassport
Local JSON registry with SQLite index
Adapter packages for LangGraph, LangChain, and OpenClaw
GitHub CI validation and Hugging Face model card export helpers
primary_use_case: To provide AI models and agents with a portable, verifiable, and locally manageable digital identity and provenance record, enhancing trust and traceability in AI development workflows.
cover_image_prompt: A meticulous cartographer in a cozy, dimly lit workshop, carefully drawing a detailed passport for a stylized AI robot. The passport is being constructed from glowing digital blueprints and verified with a magnifying glass that reveals intricate data patterns. Around the workshop, shelves are filled with labeled boxes representing different AI models and agents, each with a small, glowing passport attached. Subtle code snippets and data streams flow from the AI robot towards the passport, symbolizing its identity and lineage. The scene is rendered in a warm, inviting digital painting style with clear outlines and a focus on the detailed passport creation process, evoking a sense of trust and craftsmanship.

name: cognee
description: Knowledge Engine for AI Agent Memory in 6 lines of code
readme_summary: Cognee is an open-source knowledge engine designed to build dynamic and personalized memory for AI agents. It integrates vector search and graph databases with cognitive science principles to make ingested data searchable by meaning and connected by evolving relationships.
key_features: Ingests data in any format or structure
Combines vector search and graph databases
primary_use_case: To create intelligent, context-aware memory systems for AI agents by processing and connecting diverse data sources.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, ancient tree with roots deeply embedded in a swirling nebula of data. Each leaf on the tree represents a piece of knowledge, glowing with information. From the tree's branches, streams of light flow outwards, connecting to various AI agent avatars (represented as stylized, friendly robots). These streams of light act as conduits, feeding the agents the precise context they need. Subtle digital particles and faint code snippets float around the scene, hinting at the underlying technology. The overall mood is one of organic growth and intelligent connection. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a vibrant, ethereal color palette and soft, glowing effects.
